All Classes All Packages

S

SalableProduct - Class in model
Represents a product that can be sold in the store.
SalableProduct(String, String, BigDecimal, int) - Constructor for class model.SalableProduct
Creates a new SalableProduct with validated input.
service - package service
 
setDescription(String) - Method in class model.SalableProduct
Updates the product description.
setPrice(BigDecimal) - Method in class model.SalableProduct
Sets the product price.
setQuantity(int) - Method in class model.SalableProduct
Sets the stock quantity.
ShoppingCart - Class in service
Represents the user's shopping cart.
ShoppingCart() - Constructor for class service.ShoppingCart
 
StoreFront - Class in service
Coordinates user actions across InventoryManager and ShoppingCart.
StoreFront() - Constructor for class service.StoreFront
Creates a StoreFront with a fresh InventoryManager and ShoppingCart.
StoreFrontApp - Class in app
Console driver for the Store Front milestone.
StoreFrontApp() - Constructor for class app.StoreFrontApp
